lineup_source: Netherlands vs Sweden, Group F, 20 June 2026 (4-3-3, won 5-1)

players.name: Bart Verbruggen
players.note: Born in Zwolle; no parental origin documented, Dutch family assumed.

players.name: Denzel Dumfries
players.note: Born in Rotterdam to an Aruban father, Boris, and a Surinamese mother, Marleen.

players.name: Jan Paul van Hecke
players.note: Born in Arnemuiden; father Guus van Hecke was Dutch, mother's origin undocumented.

players.name: Virgil van Dijk
players.note: Born in Breda to a Dutch father, Ron, and an Afro-Surinamese mother, Hellen Chin Fo Sieeuw.

players.name: Micky van de Ven
players.note: Born in Wormer to father Marcel van de Ven (ex-police investigator turned TV personality) and mother Bianca Huijgen; described as of Dutch ethnicity.

players.name: Ryan Gravenberch
players.note: Born in Amsterdam to Afro-Surinamese parents, Ryan Sr. and Aretha, who emigrated from Suriname; he holds dual Dutch-Surinamese citizenship.

players.name: Frenkie de Jong
players.note: Born in Gorinchem to Dutch parents John de Jong and Marjon Schuchhard-de Bruijn.

players.name: Tijjani Reijnders
players.note: Born in Zwolle to Dutch father Martin Reijnders (former footballer) and a Moluccan (Indonesian) mother; he was eligible to play for Indonesia.

players.name: Crysencio Summerville
players.note: Born in Rotterdam to Afro-Surinamese parents.

players.name: Donyell Malen
players.note: Born in Wieringen; of Surinamese descent through his father, his parents separated when he was young and his mother's origin is undocumented.

players.name: Cody Gakpo
players.note: Born in Eindhoven; his father was born in Togo with Ghanaian ancestry, while his mother is Dutch.
